content:
<@633215996508766229> 

I'm an ultra main. I really appreciate the 💍 with this dtide. Thank you so much! I feel like I can make it past turn 2 now.

If you are open to a suggestion to help ultra:

I would:
1. Provide them with more starting aliemus (the madness omen gives more of a bonus to ultra awakers).
2. Realm Mastery adds more to life total

I don't need a buff to defense.

With this Dtides would feel like a very fast race against the clock for me. If I don't win quickly I die. But at least with starting higher health and aliemus, I have a chance at winning.

Currently when enemies do 1300dmg and I have a shield of 26....well the math doesn't work.
